creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #5)
The file contains:

# cat /usr/local/share/nzbhydra2/data/logs/wrapper.log
2022-12-06 17:41:04,265  CRITICAL - Unable to determine base path correctly. Please make sure to run NZBHydra in the folder where its binary is located. Current base path: /mnt/c/Users/strat/IdeaProjects/nzbhydra2/releases/linux-release/include

I'm not knowledgeable about the content of the port. So you may decide.
